title: Igsinc
compiled_truth: Igsinc is an external contact at [Ix](companies/ix). Over the corpus period (1999-09-24 to 2001-09-20), Igsinc sent 6 and received 170 emails, totalling 176 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (3), [Jfawcet](people/jfawcet) (2), [Sscott3](people/sscott3) (2), [Khyatt](people/khyatt) (1), [Sharris1](people/sharris1) (1).
